title: Fluffy Algerian Apricot Stir-fry
description: This herbal and fluffy Algerian dish features apricots marinated with herbs before stir-frying for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Preheat your wok or a large non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Drain the apricot can, reserving some of its liquid. Pat dry with paper towels to remove excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together the drained apricots, thyme, oregano, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Add reserved apricot juice as needed for a smooth texture.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into small meatballs using your hands. Lightly dust with all-purpose flour to prevent sticking.
Add enough oil to coat the wok or pan. Place meatballs in the hot oil and fry until golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes total.
Remove from heat and serve warm with a side of couscous or garlic bread for added texture.
